contract_claim: Adapter type dispatch relies on adapter.name containing literal substrings 'JavaScript' or 'Rust'. Adding a new adapter to the `adapters` array without matching either substring will cause it to be silently skipped (with only a console.warn). This is fragile and doesn't scale.
observed_behavior: Adapter type dispatch relies on adapter.name containing literal substrings 'JavaScript' or 'Rust'. Adding a new adapter to the `adapters` array without matching either substring will cause it to be silently skipped (with only a console.warn). This is fragile and doesn't scale.
